skill.name: programmatic-seo
skill.description: Build programmatic SEO strategies, page templates, quality checks, and launch plans for scalable search landing pages.
skill.summary: Plan scalable SEO page systems with templates, data requirements, and quality controls.
skill.author: coreyhaines31

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged inline backticks, URL examples, and SEO terminology as external commands, weak cryptography, and reconnaissance. Manual review found only Markdown guidance for programmatic SEO strategy, page templates, crawl planning, and quality checks. No executable code, prompt injection, credential access, network calls, or malicious intent was found.

low_findings.title: Static External Command Matches Are Markdown Examples
low_findings.description: Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. The flagged locations are inline URL structures and fenced template examples in Markdown, not Ruby backtick execution or shell commands. They do not execute user input or invoke external processes.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited lines are Markdown examples for URLs, schemas, templates, and checklists. No executable syntax path or command runner is present in the single scanned file.

low_findings.title: Weak Cryptography Alerts Are SEO Vocabulary Matches
low_findings.description: Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. The flagged lines contain ordinary content terms such as description, design, descriptive, searches, shareable, schema, and title guidance. No hash function, cipher, password handling, or cryptographic operation appears in context.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Manual context review shows these are natural-language SEO instructions. There is no code that imports, configures, or calls cryptographic primitives.

low_findings.title: Reconnaissance Alerts Are SEO Research Guidance
low_findings.description: Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. The flagged system and network reconnaissance lines ask users to evaluate competitors, crawlability, site architecture, and SEO visibility. This is normal search strategy guidance and does not collect host, network, or credential data.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The surrounding context is SEO planning and launch quality review. No network probing, system enumeration commands, or automated scanning behavior is present.

content.user_title: Plan Programmatic SEO Pages at Scale
content.value_statement: Programmatic SEO can create many low-value pages if strategy, data, and templates are weak. This skill helps plan scalable pages with clear search intent, unique value, and launch controls.
actual_capabilities: Identifies suitable programmatic SEO playbooks such as templates, directories, comparisons, locations, and integrations.
Defines data requirements for scalable page generation and page-level uniqueness.
Creates URL patterns, page template structures, and internal linking plans.
Builds pre-launch quality checks for content, technical SEO, indexation, and crawlability.
Outlines monitoring metrics for rankings, traffic, indexation, engagement, and conversion.
limitations: Does not perform live keyword research or fetch search volume without external tools.
Does not generate production pages, CMS records, or deployment code by itself.
Requires accurate business, audience, and data-source context from the user.
Cannot guarantee rankings because search results depend on competition, authority, and execution quality.

use_cases.title: Launch a Directory SEO Program
use_cases.description: Plan category, listing, and profile pages with data requirements, filters, and internal links.

use_cases.title: Scale Local Landing Pages
use_cases.description: Design city or region pages that include local data, provider details, and location-specific value.

use_cases.title: Build Comparison and Integration Pages
use_cases.description: Create page patterns for product comparisons, alternatives, and integrations with clear quality requirements.

prompt_templates.title: Find a Page Pattern
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me choose a programmatic SEO playbook for my business. My product is [product], my audience is [audience], and my goal is [goal].

prompt_templates.title: Define Data Requirements
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a data requirements plan for [page pattern]. Include required fields, optional fields, update frequency, and uniqueness checks.

prompt_templates.title: Draft a Page Template
prompt_templates.prompt: Design a programmatic SEO page template for [keyword pattern]. Include URL structure, title format, H1, sections, internal links, and quality rules.

prompt_templates.title: Audit a Launch Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Review my programmatic SEO launch plan for [site or page type]. Identify thin-content risks, crawl risks, indexation priorities, and monitoring metrics.

output_examples.input: Plan location pages for a coworking marketplace.
output_examples.output: A strategy document with city-page requirements, local data fields, URL patterns, internal links, quality checks, and launch phases.

output_examples.input: Create a template for product comparison pages.
output_examples.output: A page outline with comparison criteria, recommendation logic, metadata guidance, related pages, and update rules.

output_examples.input: Check whether 5,000 planned pages are too risky.
output_examples.output: A risk review covering search demand, duplicate content, data quality, crawl budget, noindex rules, and phased rollout advice.

best_practices: Start with a pattern that has clear search demand and enough unique data for every page.
Launch in phases so indexation, ranking, and engagement data can guide expansion.
Use quality gates to prevent thin, duplicated, or low-intent pages from being indexed.
anti_patterns: Generating thousands of pages by only swapping names, cities, or keywords.
Indexing every possible page combination before proving search demand and content quality.
Publishing comparison or directory pages without current data, criteria, or useful recommendations.

faq.question: What is programmatic SEO?
faq.answer: Programmatic SEO uses templates and structured data to create many search-focused pages while preserving quality and intent match.

faq.question: Can this skill do keyword research?
faq.answer: It can guide keyword pattern research, but it does not provide live search volume without data from external tools.

faq.question: Does this skill create finished website pages?
faq.answer: It creates strategy, templates, data requirements, and launch checks. It does not publish pages by itself.

faq.question: How does it reduce thin-content risk?
faq.answer: It emphasizes unique data, page-specific value, search intent, internal links, and pre-launch quality checks.

faq.question: Which page types does it support?
faq.answer: It covers templates, directories, locations, comparisons, integrations, glossaries, profiles, examples, and persona pages.

faq.question: Who should use this skill?
faq.answer: It fits founders, SEO teams, content leads, and growth teams planning scalable organic search programs.
